actions_analysis.mechanic_notes: Includes a Grappled condition imposition. Line attack (30 ft. long). Save DC 13 Dexterity save for half damage, which aligns with the Bite attack's DC.

HP calculation is slightly lower than the direct average calculation (45 vs 39), but within acceptable variance for monster statistics.
